title: Plugsuit differences
wikitext:
[]: Plugsuit differences             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jun 25, 2009 9:22 am I'm constantly hearing about how a particular bit of art or a product shows the pilots in their "Rebuild plugsuits," but I don't notice any striking differences. Is it something little like extra trim or are there really substantial differences between the two? Also, if someone could post comparison pictures in their reply, that would be great.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Thu Jun 25, 2009 10:33 am You can only tell if you look at them in comparison pics, theres a bunch of little design differences, but nothing major.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jun 25, 2009 10:59 am There are not as big differences as say the Eva units. They have lots of color differences.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jun 25, 2009 12:04 pm No real substantial changes. They turned those little bubbles in the center of Shinji and Rei's chest from black to red (signifying a core) and added a little bit here and there- once again, mostly color changes. It's things so small and ultimately pointless that once you find out what the "Big Changes" were you can;t help but be disappointed.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jun 25, 2009 12:05 pm its all a marketing ploy

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu Jun 25, 2009 12:21 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=209127#post209127 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=229639#post229639

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Jun 25, 2009 12:24 pm As has been said, the changes are very superficial, and for all intents and purposes the suits are the same as in the original save for a few tweaks, many of which are probably the result of moving from a TV budget to a feature film budget. BTW, Mari's suit looks like she's got hands holding her boobs in place.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Thu Jun 25, 2009 3:50 pm Lol that it does. I'd also like to note that Mari's plugsuit is much different than the others', probably because o' the whole "non-limbed" thing about Eva-05... After all, nerve connections to things that don't exist might be kinda painful.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Jun 25, 2009 6:27 pm Mari's plugsuit looks like what them bitches at Diebuster wore. When Khara released two signed shikishis by Sadamoto, some Japanese blog (I believe Kinkyuu News) made a comparison of these new plugsuit illustrations with previous versions. Aus Spanisch: http://www.reiliberationparade.com.ar/evangelion/nblog/?p=464 This is the comparation pic http://www.reiliberationparade.com.ar/evangelion/nblog/wp-content/uploads/2008/12/vip1012277.jpg But what I did note some days ago while watching 1.11, was that Rei's plugsuit "core" looked much bigger.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 25, 2009 6:40 pm AchtungAffen: I get a hotlink error trying to access that image on your site.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Jun 25, 2009 7:30 pm Copy the link and paste it on a blank window/tab Anyways, I betta post it somewhere else: http://img36.imageshack.us/img36/5443/vip1012277.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Megashadow13 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 2:41 am if you want plug suit diffences, indeed Mari's plug suit is the mother of all 'OMGWTF' plug suits... well thats how i went when i first saw it XD hahah but yea hers is strikingly different from the other 5

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 26, 2009 2:50 am She has a 'OMGWTF' Evangelion, so it makes sense that her suit would match. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Megashadow13 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 3:35 am Timstuff wrote: She has a 'OMGWTF' Evangelion, so it makes sense that her suit would match. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:54 am Megashadow13 wrote: Timstuff wrote: She has a 'OMGWTF' Evangelion, so it makes sense that her suit would match. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 26, 2009 9:35 am -Oh to be those Mari breast hands.....would be a happy existence.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jun 26, 2009 3:40 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: -Oh to be those Mari breast hands.....would be a happy existence.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 26, 2009 4:25 pm The idea isn't without precedent... [URL=http://img140.imageshack.us/i/handbra.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 7:47 pm ^that's as wrong as it is awesome would be a great gag gift EDIT: post no. 3,400

[]:             Quote Post by Megashadow13 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 11:33 pm Timstuff wrote: The idea isn't without precedent...
